vocab.meaning: phóng to, tập trung cận cảnh vào một chi tiết
vocab.example: While I love wide vistas, I often zoom in on intricate patterns in nature, like the veins of a leaf.

vocab.meaning: quan sát, thăm dò để tìm vị trí đẹp
vocab.example: I usually arrive at a location early to scope out the best vantage point before the sun starts to set.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (không khí, vẻ đẹp)
vocab.example: Before taking the shot, I like to just sit for a moment and soak up the tranquil atmosphere of the lakeside.

vocab.meaning: lóng ngóng, dò dẫm (thường là với thiết bị)
vocab.example: I occasionally fumble around with my tripod in the dark when I’m trying to capture the star-filled sky.
The dark, moody clouds really set off the vibrant autumn leaves, creating a very dramatic photograph.

vocab.meaning: kết thúc, hoàn thành (một buổi chụp hình)
vocab.example: Once the golden hour is over, I usually wrap up my session and head home to review the footage.

vocab.meaning: dự trữ, chuẩn bị đầy đủ (pin, thẻ nhớ)
vocab.example: Whenever I go on a hiking trip, I always stock up on extra memory cards because I tend to take hundreds of photos.

vocab.meaning: có thể được coi là, trông giống như
vocab.example: The clarity of the water was so perfect that my photo could almost pass for a professional postcard.
It was frustrating when a thick layer of fog suddenly moved in and blotted out the entire mountain range.
There is a small hidden trail that looks out over the entire city, which is my favorite spot for night photography.
